body_txt: Basically this is when one of the good guys becomes a villain not out of choice, but because they were transformed into one one way or another (this makes it a Super-Trope to several tropes as outlined below). This can also apply to non-sapient entities, such as computers that go nuts , mons that are Turned Against Their Masters because someone else is giving them orders, and so on. As long as it was happy with its allegiance and something other than its own whims changed it, it fits. Subtrope of Was Once a Man , Forced into Evil , and Forced Transformation . This is a common element in werewolf and other werebeast stories, particularly when the human side cannot control the beast and the transformation only takes being mauled by another were to set in. Contrast Heel–Face Brainwashing and Not Brainwashed .   Please only put examples here that don't fit into any of the above subtropes.
